backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a cemetery record management system defining data types (GraveRecord, DeceasedPerson, GraveOwner, etc.) and site content structures (SiteContent, HomepageHeroContent, ParishFooterContent), with sorting utilities for grave records.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: consistent client-side alley sorting across frontend components, and a plot-number-change confirmation safeguard in GraveEditDialog.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted catalogue of per-file summaries for all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes in each component, hook, and page.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) and applying base border and background styles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to the cemetery management system name and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/publish-live.build64.txt: CI/CD deployment marker file for build 64 with no functional changes, used solely to trigger a Live environment deployment.
frontend/redeploy-trigger.build63.txt: CI/CD redeploy trigger file for build 63 created to force a new build artifact after a deployment error, containing no functional changes.
frontend/redeploy-trigger.build64.txt: CI/CD pipeline trigger file for build 64 with no application logic, used to produce a new build artifact and initiate redeployment.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that handles actor initialization with a timeout-based error screen, identity/auth state, profile setup modal, and conditionally renders the public page or admin panel based on authorization.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access denied UI shown to authenticated but unauthorized users, providing a logout button that clears identity and React Query cache.
frontend/src/components/ActorInitializat: Error screen displayed when the backend actor fails to initialize, offering a retry button with loading state and troubleshooting tips.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminGrave: Renders an interactive tile-based cemetery map grouped by sorted alleys, color-coded by grave status, with click-to-edit functionality via GraveEditDialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/CemeteryLa: Admin UI for managing cemetery layout, allowing adding/removing alleys and graves with confirmation dialogs and sorted alley display.
frontend/src/components/admin/GraveEditD: A dialog for creating or editing a grave record, managing fields like location, status, owner, deceased persons, and payment date, with location-change confirmation and delete support.
frontend/src/components/admin/GraveManag: Admin component for managing graves with infinite-scroll pagination, debounced in-memory full-text search, and a lazily-loaded dialog for creating/editing graves.
frontend/src/components/admin/imageEditi: Utility functions for image processing: loading an image from a URL, converting a File to a data URL, and resizing an image to fit within max dimensions while preserving aspect ratio.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImageUploa: Reusable image upload component that resizes the selected file, tracks upload progress, and saves or removes an ExternalBlob via a provided callback.
frontend/src/components/admin/ManagerDel: Boss-only admin panel for granting and revoking manager access by Principal ID, displaying current managers and the owner in a table/card layout.
Admin component that generates and downloads a printable A4 HTML/PDF document listing all cemetery graves grouped by alley with status and payment info.
frontend/src/components/admin/SiteConten: Admin form for editing all site content sections (hero, parish footer, prayer, cemetery info) and uploading logo/hero background images via ImageUploadEditor.
frontend/src/components/ConnectionStatus: Banner component that displays backend connectivity status (checking, disconnected) with a retry button, using the useBackendHealthCheck hook.
frontend/src/components/FloatingLoginCon: A floating action button fixed to the bottom-right corner that triggers Internet Identity login, disabled while login is in progress.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Parish footer component that fetches and displays parish info including address, mass times, contact details, social links, and a bank account number with copy-to-clipboard functionality.
A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a selected grave, including status, location, deceased persons, and a payment status message with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/components/GraveResultsList: Renders a paginated list of grave search results for both admin (full records) and public (limited) views, with lazy-loaded edit dialog and load-more functionality.
frontend/src/components/GraveSearch.tsx: Search interface for graves that supports both admin and public modes, using debounced in-memory full-text filtering over precomputed search indices with infinite pagination for admin.
frontend/src/components/GraveTileMap.tsx: Visual cemetery map that renders graves as colored tiles organized by alley, with a status legend and a detail card dialog on tile click.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header displaying the parish logo (custom or fallback), name, a theme toggle button, and a logout button when the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the homepage hero section with a background image, headline, and intro paragraph fetched from public site content, with loading skeletons and an error banner fallback.
frontend/src/components/LazyMount.tsx: A wrapper component that defers mounting its children until they are near the viewport using an IntersectionObserver hook, with optional placeholder support.
frontend/src/components/PrivatePreviewBa: Displays a top-of-page amber alert banner indicating the app is running in Private Preview Mode for internal testing only.
frontend/src/components/PrivatePreviewGa: Blocks access to public content in Private Preview Mode by showing an Internet Identity login prompt when the user is unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name and optional email, then saves their profile via a mutation with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/PublicSectionsTi: Renders a grid of four navigation tiles (map, search, prayer, about) that call an onSelect callback when clicked.
frontend/src/components/SiteContentLoadE: A reusable amber alert banner shown when site content fails to load, displaying a customizable error message.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuthorization: Queries the backend for the current user's access role and returns authorization state flags indicating whether the user is a boss, manager, or otherwise allowed.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendHealthCheck: Periodically polls the backend health check endpoint and exposes connection status ('checking', 'connected', 'disconnected') along with a manual recheck function.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Generic hook that delays propagating a value update until after a specified debounce delay (default 300ms).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient and exposing status flags through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useInView.ts: Uses IntersectionObserver to detect when a referenced DOM element enters the viewport, with optional triggerOnce behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/usePrivatePreviewMode: Manages a private preview mode flag that can be enabled or disabled via URL hash parameters, persisting the state in sessionStorage for the browser session.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations, covering graves, cemetery state, user profiles, site content, and other domain entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, tiles), and smooth theme transition styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page with lazy-loaded tabbed sections for grave management, cemetery map, layout, search, PDF export, site content, and (for boss users) manager delegation.
frontend/src/pages/PublicPage.tsx: Public-facing page combining a hero section, navigation tiles, lazy-loaded grave search and tile map tabs, and optional prayer/cemetery info sections driven by site content data.
frontend/src/utils/alleySort.ts: Provides a natural-sort comparator and a `sortAlleys` helper that sorts alley objects by name with correct numeric ordering (e.g., '2' before '10').
frontend/src/utils/authErrors.ts: Utility functions that inspect error messages to classify backend authorization failures into boss-lock, manager-auth, general authorization, connectivity, and access-control-init error types.
frontend/src/utils/graveFullTextSearch.t: Provides index-building and in-memory full-text search functions for admin GraveRecord, public PublicGraveShape, and public PublicGraveResult types, with optional early-exit via maxResults.
frontend/src/utils/graveStatusStyles.ts: Exports helper functions that map GraveStatus enum values to consistent Tailwind CSS classes and badge variants for backgrounds, hover rings, text, legend colors, and badge styles.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a cemetery management app, documenting known bugs (grave number change deletes alley, inconsistent alley sorting), existing features, and pending fix requests (AR-1 through AR-5) with architectural notes.
